cot_prefix: Okay, let me try to figure out this problem. So there are five people on a soccer team: Alice, Bob, Claire, Dave, and Eve. They each start in specific positions. Let me list out their initial positions first. Initial Assignments: - Alice: right winger - Bob: right midfielder - Claire: left winger - Dave: cheerleader - Eve: goalkeeper Now, there are a series of swaps that happen during the game. Let me go through each swap step by step and track the positions. First swap: Dave and Bob trade positions. So, before this swap: - Dave is cheerleader - Bob is right midfielder After swapping: - Dave is now right midfielder - Bob is now cheerleader Second swap: Dave and Eve trade positions. Now, before this swap: - Dave is right midfielder - Eve is goalkeeper After swapping: - Dave is goalkeeper - Eve is right midfielder Third swap: Alice and Bob trade positions. Before this swap: - Alice is right winger - Bob is cheerleader After swapping: - Alice is cheerleader - Bob is right winger Fourth swap: Dave and Claire trade positions.
